description: Simplified single-table schema optimised for fast summary-based embeddings and hierarchical retrieval.

content.description: Unified content table storing documents, sections, paragraphs and sentences.  Summaries (or raw sentence text) are embedded for semantic search; full text is kept for answer generation only where needed.

title.description: Heading / suggested title (fallback if none extracted)

summary.description: Rich summary capturing all key facts / figures / instructions / topics / entities.  Used for embeddings.

content_text.description: Original text (sentence) or raw concatenation for higher levels.  Not embedded.

schema_id.description: Logical schema/version label for ingestion provenance

source_uri.description: Absolute file path or original URL

document_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the source artifact

is_active.description: False when row is deprecated or superseded

embedding_configuration.description: Only the 'summary' column is embedded for fast semantic search (except for sentences where summary == content_text).  The resulting vector is stored in _summary_emb.
